segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a wide shot of the G2 Esports team at their competitive desk during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024, their coach clapping and gesturing encouragement, as a commentator notes that "slowly but surely all the pieces are showing up here for G2." The scene transitions to in-game footage on the Anubis map, where G2 is defending B-site against Team Liquid, leading 10-6. Commentary highlights m0NESY's "heart-stopping performance" but observes "for Liquid, there's no such luck," adding that "No one's bailing them out individually" and "They're being beaten on all fronts right now." Amidst dynamic gunfire and smoke effects, G2’s Niko, wielding a white-patterned rifle, eliminates multiple Team Liquid players—NAF, Twistzz, and cadiaN—with the commentator specifically praising him for "racking up kills as well, four in that," and attributing "every single kill on the defense on that B bomb site from Niko." Nexa and huNter- join the fight, with Nexa eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz, and huNter- taking down cadiaN, accompanied by the distinct sound of a bomb being planted and a commentator exclaiming, "I know there's a lot here." The round culminates in a tense 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz, which huNter- wins with a decisive "Boom!" after a commentator asks "What you got Niko?", noting "The util has been so punishing." The camera cuts back to the real-world setup, showing the G2 players celebrating with smiles while the Team Liquid coach displays a disappointed expression, as the commentator reflects that "with Niko dead, that was the one player with any health left remove from the round." As the match continues into Round 18 with G2 now leading 11-6, huNter- secures another final kill amidst aggressive pushes and dynamic gunfire, leading the commentator to remark, "Hunter's gonna have to try and make up for it as they lose HooXi," and that "everyone is so hurt," with G2 "pulling over these."
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a wide shot of the G2 Esports team at their competitive desk during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 event, with their coach standing behind them, clapping and gesturing in encouragement. The players, wearing black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, are intensely focused on their screens. The scene transitions to in-game footage from the map Anubis, where G2 is defending B-site against Team Liquid. The scoreboard shows G2 leading 10-6 in Round 17. The gameplay highlights a clutch situation where G2’s Niko, wielding a white-patterned rifle, eliminates multiple Team Liquid players—NAF, Twistzz, and cadiaN—while navigating the sunlit stone corridors of the ancient ruin. The environment features detailed Egyptian-style architecture with hieroglyphs, columns, and a central pool. As the round progresses, Nexa and huNter- join the fight, with Nexa eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz, and huNter- taking down cadiaN. The round ends with a 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz, which huNter- wins, securing the round for G2. The camera cuts back to the real-world setup, showing the G2 players celebrating with smiles and gestures, while the Team Liquid coach stands with a disappointed expression. The HUD displays sponsor logos including Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy, with the minimap showing the B-site as the focal point. The match continues into Round 18, with G2 now leading 11-6, and the gameplay resumes with G2 pushing aggressively, eliminating more Team Liquid players in quick succession. The atmosphere is tense and fast-paced, with dynamic gunfire, smoke effects, and strategic positioning. The bottom-left feed shows close-ups of G2 players like m0NESY, Nexa, and huNter- reacting to the action, while the bottom-right feed displays Team Liquid’s remaining players, including Skullz and NAF, who are eliminated. The final moments show huNter- securing the round with a final kill, and the G2 players visibly relieved and excited, while the Team Liquid coach looks on with frustration.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective from G2 Esports' player m0NESY on the Anubis map during a critical 3v1 clutch situation at B-site, with G2 leading 11-6. m0NESY, wielding a purple and orange AWP, eliminates Team Liquid's Skullz with a precise headshot, followed by huNter- securing the final kill on cadiaN, completing the clutch. During this, a commentator announces "Nexa arrives, just in time" and "NAF dead," then states "Hunter follows up and that leaves it all on Skullz," lamenting Skullz's missed opportunity. The scene then cuts to the real-world arena, showing G2 players celebrating with high-fives and intense reactions, while Team Liquid's coach stands up in disappointment. The commentator continues, "Nexa will finish the job as G2 sprint towards the promise of Inferno, one round away from taking this one the distance and denying Team Liquid." Gameplay resumes in Round 18, with G2 now leading 12-6. Team Liquid pushes B-site, planting the bomb via Twistzz. The commentator observes "G2 just buying so much time" and someone "tries to break the smoke," gifting "Kady in the opener." G2 defends fiercely: Nexa eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with dual pistols, while huNter- takes out cadiaN. HooXi then eliminates NAF, leaving Skullz as the last defender. However, the commentator states, "with Hooxi knocked out of the round, this one might just have to get written off here and now. They're even going to lose Nico back in the spawn," which contradicts HooXi's visual kill. The round ends with the bomb exploding, securing a 12-7 win for G2. The commentator humorously speculates on player morale, saying, "Monessy at 23 and 6, he's like, hell yeah, I believe we can do it. Nexa, do you believe? Nexa's like, no, I don't," and concludes by emphasizing the score: "And now 12, that's a lot. Five chances, that's a lot." Throughout, the HUD displays sponsor logos like Qiddiya, Monster Energy, and DHL, while the background wall features ESL Pro Tour and Intel branding. Players' jerseys show team-specific sponsors: G2 with Logitech and Monster Energy, Team Liquid with Coinbase and Honda. The minimap and in-game environment highlight the sunlit, stone-structured Anubis map with tropical plants and multiple pathways.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a wide shot of Team Liquid players, in their blue and white Coinbase, Honda, and Monster Energy jerseys, seated at their stations, focused on monitors against an ESL Pro Tour backdrop featuring Intel, DHL, and Predator logos, and 'CHENGDU 2024' branding. Caster JUSTHARRY is heard saying "Surely. Round by round," with HUGO echoing, "Round by round. That's how you look at it." HUGO then provides historical context, noting how he's enjoyed seeing 'Zeus' back behind Liquid, getting "very hyped, get very loud" when they were winning, and that 'Twistzz' left his previous team to reunite with 'Zeus' in this project. The scene transitions to intense gameplay on the sunlit, stone-walled Ancient map, where Team Liquid aggressively pushes B-site and plants the bomb. The HUD shows G2 Esports leading 12-6 as the round timer counts down. G2, in black Logitech and Monster Energy jerseys, defends fiercely. A caster observes, "when you see m0NESY and Niko group up in middle like this, they're gonna do something," adding that "m0NESY loves that group play out through middle." Visually, m0NESY eliminates NAF with a rifle, while Nexa, wielding a dual-wielded weapon, takes down Yekindar and Twistzz. Although a caster calls out "m0NESY's now got the drop on cadiaN here," the visual confirms huNter- secures a kill on cadiaN with a pistol. The action culminates in a 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz, with a caster noting that "Hunter whittled down to 1 HP, barely surviving" just before huNter- emerges victorious. The screen flashes 'Clutch Situation' as the scoreboard updates to 12-7. The Team Liquid coach, standing with a clipboard, reacts with visible disappointment. Sponsor logos for Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy are displayed at the bottom, while caster names JUSTHARRY and HUGO, and observer handles JAK3YCSGO and JEYRAZZ, are visible in the top-right.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a wide shot of the Team Liquid players in their blue and white jerseys, adorned with logos for Coinbase, Honda, and Monster Energy, seated at their stations with headsets on, focused on their monitors. The background features the ESL Pro Tour branding and sponsor logos including Intel, DHL, and Predator, with 'CHENGDU 2024' prominently displayed. The scene transitions to gameplay on the Ancient map, where Team Liquid, led by cadiaN, pushes aggressively at B-site, planting the bomb. G2 Esports, in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, defends fiercely. The HUD shows the score at 12-6 in favor of G2, with the round timer counting down. The action intensifies as m0NESY, using a rifle, eliminates NAF, while Nexa, wielding a dual-wielded weapon, takes down Yekindar and Twistzz. huNter- secures a kill on cadiaN with a pistol. The round culminates in a 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz, with huNter- emerging victorious. The final kill is confirmed as the screen flashes with the 'Clutch Situation' notification, and the scoreboard updates to 12-7. The Team Liquid coach, standing with a clipboard, reacts with disappointment. The bottom of the screen displays sponsor logos including Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy, while the top-right corner shows caster names JUSTHARRY and HUGO, and observer handles JAK3YCSGO and JEYRAZZ. The minimap in the top-left corner tracks player positions on the sunlit, stone-walled Ancient map, with B-site as the focal point of the intense combat.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective of G2 Esports' huNter- navigating the sunlit, stone-walled corridors of the Anubis map during Round 20/24 of the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match, with G2 leading 12-7. Commentators praise a player's skill, noting "two or three kills in this round, two of them very hard shots to hit while he's running," and how he "cancels that strafe so well." In a tense 1 vs 3 clutch, huNter- eliminates an opponent with a pistol. The scene then cuts to the Team Liquid bench, where their coach, in a blue and white jersey, stands with a clipboard, visibly disappointed. Commentary reflects on the match flow, stating "round by round, that's two in a row for Liquid," and observing that losing "seven players total across six rounds" is significant, though they "do have a lot of money banked up." The gameplay returns to Round 21/24, with the score now 12-8, as G2 defends B-site in a 5 vs 5 situation. Commentators detail Team Liquid's strategy, noting "Yekindar risks it all on a smoke walk in through dark," and "a nice response out of cadiaN." They acknowledge G2's huNter-, stating "they know about huNter, they know where he is, but they well, they'll deal with him." The action quickly brings the round "down to a three on three," with the bomb "dropped back over towards long," and "Skullz might be the candidate nominated to go and get that." As tension builds, a commentator remarks, "this is awkward, this guy takes some serious time." The camera follows m0NESY, who eliminates NAF with a pistol, while commentators observe "Twistzz is leaving, that just leaves NAF alone in dark," and that Liquid "might not even recommit towards B." Nexa then eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with dual-wielded weapons, with commentators adding that "smoke will not stop Twist, he can come through that gap." huNter- eliminates cadiaN, who had planted the bomb, leading to a final 1v1 between huNter- and Skullz. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Qiddiya, Monster Energy, and Intel, while the background wall behind the players features ESL Pro Tour branding with logos for Intel, DHL, and Predator. The minimap in the top-left corner shows strategic positioning around the ancient Egyptian-style B-site. The final moments show huNter- securing the kill in a tense 1v1 clutch, winning the round for G2, as commentators discuss utility like how "the UTEL's gonna buy them more time," the use of "a remolly," and how "Flash will delay it," concluding that "Remolly and Temple... long enough for the smoke to fade, that's a bit of an issue."
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective of a G2 Esports player navigating the sunlit, stone-walled corridors of the Anubis map during a critical round (Round 20/24) of the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match. The score is 12-7 in favor of G2, and the match is in a clutch situation with 1 vs 3. The player, huNter-, is seen engaging in a firefight, eliminating an opponent with a pistol. The scene cuts to the Team Liquid bench, where the coach, wearing a blue and white jersey with a headset, stands up with a clipboard, visibly disappointed as the round progresses. The gameplay returns to the map, now Round 21/24, with the score 12-8. G2 is defending B-site, and the players are alive 5 vs 5. The camera follows m0NESY, who eliminates NAF with a pistol, then Nexa eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with dual-wielded weapons. huNter- eliminates cadiaN, who had planted the bomb, leaving a 1v1 between huNter- and Skullz. The final moments show huNter- securing the kill in a tense 1v1 clutch, winning the round for G2. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Qiddiya, Monster Energy, and Intel, while the background wall behind the players features ESL Pro Tour branding with logos for Intel, DHL, and Predator. The minimap in the top-left corner shows the strategic positioning of players around B-site, with the environment featuring ancient Egyptian-style architecture, palm trees, and clear skies.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the Anubis map unfolds with G2 Esports leading Team Liquid 12-8. As the round begins, G2 defends B-site, and commentators excitedly note "m0NESY's posted, he doesn't miss" as m0NESY, wielding a sniper rifle, eliminates NAF. The camera then switches to Nexa, whom the commentators refer to as "Niko," engaging in a fierce firefight, eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz with precise shots, with exclamations of "Niko up close!" and discussions about Twistzz's missed timings. Despite Team Liquid's push, which sees cadiaN plant the bomb at B-site, with commentators mentioning "it's Kadian to deal with him," the tension culminates in a 1v1 clutch. Although the commentators continue to discuss Nexa and m0NESY's contributions, huNter- calmly secures the final kill on Skullz, winning the round for G2. The G2 team celebrates with raised fists, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in disappointment. The sunlit ancient ruin environment, complete with stone structures and tropical plants, forms the backdrop, while the HUD displays sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, Monster Energy, Coinbase, and Honda. G2 players in black jerseys and Team Liquid players in blue and white jerseys are visible in the bottom-left feed, all against a dynamic audio backdrop of commentators providing a play-by-play, noting moments of quiet and intense action, and even discussing Team Liquid's strategy and Twistzz's performance despite his earlier elimination.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment captures a high-stakes round from the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the Anubis map, with G2 Esports leading 12-8 against Team Liquid. The action begins with G2 defending B-site, where m0NESY, using a sniper rifle, eliminates NAF from Team Liquid. The camera then switches to Nexa, who engages in a firefight, eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz with precise shots. As the round progresses, huNter- secures a kill on cadiaN, who had planted the bomb at B-site, forcing a 1v1 clutch situation between huNter- and Skullz. The tension peaks as huNter- successfully eliminates Skullz, securing the round for G2. The scene cuts to the G2 team celebrating with raised fists, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in disappointment. The environment is a sunlit ancient ruin with stone structures and tropical plants, and the HUD displays sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, Monster Energy, Coinbase, and Honda. The bottom-left feed shows G2 players in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy patches, while Team Liquid players wear blue and white jerseys with Coinbase and Honda logos. The background wall features ESL Pro Tour branding with Intel, DHL, and other sponsor logos.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with intense first-person gameplay on the sunlit ancient ruins of the Anubis map during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match between G2 Esports and Team Liquid. Commentators describe the critical 1v1 clutch situation, noting "uncharacteristic misses" and how "the bomb lost here as well as NAF took it into this fight on the spawn." G2's huNter-, wielding a sniper rifle, eliminates NAF and then Skullz, securing the round for G2 amidst a flurry of game sounds like gunshots and UI alerts. The commentators erupt in excitement, exclaiming, "G2! Lurch back into form! They shut down the Liquid comeback! And they lock in a third map of Inferno, vying for their spot in the playoffs!" The scoreboard updates to 13-10 for G2, and the scene cuts to the real-world arena where G2 players, in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, celebrate with high-fives and hugs, their coach behind them. Team Liquid players, in blue and white jerseys with Coinbase and Honda logos, show visible disappointment. The camera then transitions to the Mediterranean-style streets of the Inferno map for the Decider round, with both teams starting with pistols. As gameplay resumes, a commentator analyzes the utility, stating, "if Twistzz is able to get this smoke in in time, that is a bit of an issue." Twistzz from Team Liquid engages in a firefight, eliminating G2's nexa and HooXi before being eliminated himself, accompanied by rapid gunshots. The commentators' excitement builds again, with one exclaiming, "This is very well countered and the doolies light up G2! Almost ace!" and another adding, "Sick guys!" The round ends with G2 down to 1v5, and the scene cuts back to Team Liquid’s coach, clipboard in hand, visibly frustrated. Sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Intel are prominently displayed on-screen and in the arena backdrop, reinforcing the professional esports setting.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment begins with intense first-person gameplay from the map Anubis during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match between G2 Esports and Team Liquid. G2, in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, defends B-site while Team Liquid, in blue and white jerseys with Coinbase and Honda logos, pushes aggressively. The HUD displays a 1v1 clutch situation with G2’s huNter- holding a sniper rifle, eliminating NAF and then Skullz to secure the round. The scoreboard updates to 13-10 for G2. The scene cuts to the real-world arena, where G2 players celebrate with high-fives and hugs, their coach standing behind them, while Team Liquid players show disappointment. The camera then transitions to the next map, Inferno, for the Decider round, showing both teams starting with pistols. The gameplay resumes with Twistzz from Team Liquid engaging in a firefight, eliminating two G2 players (nexa and HooXi) before being eliminated himself. The round ends with G2 down to 1v5, and the scene cuts back to the players’ reactions, with Team Liquid’s coach standing with a clipboard, visibly frustrated. The environment shifts from the sunlit ancient ruins of Anubis to the Mediterranean-style streets of Inferno, with vibrant graffiti and stone buildings. Sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Intel are visible on-screen and in the arena backdrop, reinforcing the professional esports setting.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 arena opens with a wide shot, showing Team Liquid players in blue and white jerseys, adorned with Coinbase and Honda logos, seated at ESL-branded stations with Logitech peripherals. Energetic commentary begins, praising a 'very well counted' and 'very well handled' play, followed by an 'absolutely slam' as the scene transitions to intense in-game Counter-Strike: Global Offensive action on the Inferno map. This Decider match in the Group Stage sees Team Liquid leading 1-0 in Round 2, pushing aggressively onto B-site against G2 Esports, whose players wear black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy branding. The commentators build tension, noting 'all you can do is watch' and reacting with a simple 'nice' to early plays. Gunshots and game sounds punctuate the commentary as G2's Nexa swiftly eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with precise pistol shots, with a commentator noting a 'Nova bought out for Twists' and recalling him 'warming up with that across this series.' The action intensifies with an 'Oh, oh!' from the commentators as HooXi secures a kill on NAF with dual pistols, and huNter- eliminates cadiaN, who is described as being 'in hot water' in 'enemy territory.' The commentators analyze the situation, mentioning 'think on Nexa' and predicting 'Skullz will block and live' as he becomes the last TL player. However, huNter- ultimately defeats Skullz in a decisive 1v1 clutch, securing the round for G2. The scoreboard updates to 1-1, visually contradicting a commentator's later statement of 'Liquid with 2-0.' Real-time reactions show a G2 player adjusting his headset with focus, while a visibly disappointed Team Liquid coach stands, holding a clipboard. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, and Qiddiya, with the minimap highlighting B-site in the sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting of Inferno, where commentators also mention G2 going 'back up the banana' and a player getting 'turned into mash' by 'that Nova' in a 'pump and dump' play, before anticipating the next round with a 'little D-go opener.'
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a wide shot of the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 arena, showcasing Team Liquid players in their blue and white jerseys with Coinbase and Honda logos, seated at their stations with ESL-branded chairs and Logitech peripherals. The scene quickly transitions to in-game footage of a Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map, specifically a Decider match in the Group Stage. Team Liquid (TL) leads 1-0 against G2 Esports in Round 2. The gameplay focuses on B-site, where TL pushes aggressively. G2, in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy branding, defends. The camera follows G2’s Nexa, who eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with precise pistol shots. HooXi then secures a kill on NAF with dual pistols, while huNter- eliminates cadiaN, leaving Skullz as the last TL player. The round ends with a 1v1 clutch: huNter- defeats Skullz, securing the round for G2. The scoreboard updates to 1-1. The video cuts to real-time reactions: a G2 player adjusts his headset with a focused expression, while a Team Liquid coach stands up, visibly disappointed, holding a clipboard. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, and Qiddiya, with the minimap showing B-site as the focal point. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings and narrow alleys, consistent with Inferno’s design.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective of a Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Decider between G2 Esports and Team Liquid. The score is 0-2 in favor of Team Liquid as Round 3 begins, with G2 defending B-site. Commentators discuss players using 'Deagles' and one 'volunteering himself up as tribute' amidst the sounds of gunfire. G2’s Nexa, wielding a dual-wielded weapon, engages from a high vantage point, eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz. Simultaneously, commentators praise Twistzz, exclaiming 'He's having a great day,' and 'Finally! There's the ace! We've had so many nearly aces and it's Twistz to finally get one,' followed by 'Breaking through' and '4K's all day,' referring to his impressive performance. The camera then cuts to the real-world arena, showing G2 players in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, reacting with focus and intensity. The scene returns to gameplay, now Round 4/24, with Team Liquid pushing B-site. A grenade sound is heard as commentators note 'They can't even sit on ramp.' cadiaN plants the bomb, and commentators observe 'their barrel gives Kadian full warning, he hits his shot.' G2’s huNter- eliminates cadiaN with a pistol. The round becomes a tense 1v1 between m0NESY and Skullz. As m0NESY secures the clutch win, eliminating Skullz with a rifle from his perspective, the commentators declare, 'Even re-aggresses! Twistz still flawless! 11 and zero! Finally, they learn that he's mortal after all, but he's done enough to win the round for Team Liquid,' and later, 'Twistz is bottled up,' despite G2 visually winning the round. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy, while the background wall features ESL Pro Tour branding. G2 players celebrate the round win, with Nexa standing up and clenching his fist in triumph. The Team Liquid coach, wearing a blue and white jersey with Coinbase and Honda logos, stands up with a clipboard, visibly disappointed. The match continues with G2 now leading 1-3, and the players reset for the next round.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective of a Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage, specifically a Decider match between G2 Esports and Team Liquid. The score is 0-2 in favor of Team Liquid, and the round is Round 3/24. G2 is defending B-site, with players positioned strategically around the area. The minimap shows G2 players (nexa, HooXi, huNter-, m0NESY, Niko) and Team Liquid players (YEKINDAR, Twistzz, Skullz, NAF, cadiaN) alive. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style alley with stone walls, potted plants, and string lights overhead. G2’s Nexa, wielding a dual-wielded weapon, engages from a high vantage point, eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz. The camera then cuts to the real-world arena, showing G2 players in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, reacting with focus and intensity. The scene returns to gameplay, now Round 4/24, with Team Liquid pushing B-site. cadiaN plants the bomb, and G2’s huNter- eliminates him with a pistol. The round becomes a 1v1 between m0NESY and Skullz, with m0NESY securing the clutch win. The final kill is shown from m0NESY’s perspective, eliminating Skullz with a rifle. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy, while the background wall features ESL Pro Tour branding. The G2 players celebrate the round win, with Nexa standing up and clenching his fist in triumph. The Team Liquid coach, wearing a blue and white jersey with Coinbase and Honda logos, stands up with a clipboard, visibly disappointed. The match continues with G2 now leading 1-3, and the players reset for the next round.

audio_updated_entities.Twistzz: Team Liquid player, visually eliminated by Nexa. Commentators praise his performance, saying 'He's having a great day,' 'Finally! There's the ace! We've had so many nearly aces and it's Twistz to finally get one,' 'Breaking through,' '4K's all day.' Later, they mention him 'getting his Molly stuck in,' being 'flawless, 11 and zero,' and having 'done enough to win the round for Team Liquid,' and finally being 'bottled up,' despite the visual showing G2 winning the round.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a 'Counter-terrorists win' sound effect, followed by commentators discussing previous map performances and setting the stage for Round 6 of the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage on the Inferno map. The scoreboard shows G2 Esports at 0 and Team Liquid at 4, with commentators noting Liquid's 'flawless' scoreline and how they are 'absolutely rocking G2's world.' As G2’s m0NESY and HooXi defend B-site from a first-person perspective, Team Liquid pushes aggressively, accompanied by intense gunshots and commentator remarks highlighting 'pressure on YEKINDAR on the MP9' and how 'YEKINDAR takes it one step further.' G2's defense holds strong, with Nexa eliminating YEKINDAR and Twistzz, followed by huNter- taking down cadiaN. Commentators describe the B-site push as 'whittling down' and ultimately failing to 'take shape.' The round culminates in a tense 1v1 clutch between HooXi and Skullz, with HooXi securing the kill to win the round for G2. This prompts visible relief and celebration from G2 players in real-life footage, while Team Liquid’s coach stands up in disappointment. An 'Intel Moments of Brilliance' highlight then shows NAF’s elimination by HooXi, as commentators retrospectively praise NAF's 'play through the smoke' from a previous round and remark that 'Skullz isn't overdoing it.' The scene concludes with G2 players focused and composed, surrounded by ESL Pro Tour and sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, and Qiddiya, all within the sunlit Mediterranean-style Inferno map.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective of a Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage. G2 Esports, in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, are defending B-site against Team Liquid, who wear blue and white jerseys with Coinbase and Honda branding. The scoreboard shows G2 at 0, Team Liquid at 4, in Round 6 of 24. The gameplay begins with G2’s m0NESY and HooXi holding B-site, while Team Liquid pushes aggressively. YEKINDAR and Twistzz are eliminated by Nexa in quick succession, followed by cadiaN being taken down by huNter-. The round becomes a 1v1 clutch between HooXi and Skullz, with HooXi securing the kill to win the round for G2. The camera cuts to real-life footage of the players: G2 players react with relief and celebration, while Team Liquid’s coach stands up in disappointment. The scene returns to gameplay with an 'Intel Moments of Brilliance' highlight showing NAF’s elimination by HooXi. The final frames show the G2 players focused and composed, with the ESL Pro Tour and sponsor logos (Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya) visible on screen and the background wall. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings, graffiti, and narrow alleys, consistent with the Inferno map’s B-site area.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on Inferno unfolds at B-site, with G2 Esports (black jerseys) defending against Team Liquid (blue and white) while facing a 0-5 deficit. The sunlit Mediterranean urban environment, featuring stone buildings and a blue van, is quickly filled with intense gunfire and smoke grenades. Commentary highlights early action, noting Niko was 'naded again,' potentially for the fourth consecutive round. G2's Nexa, wielding dual weapons, swiftly eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz in quick succession. Despite commentators observing Twistzz 'going hog wild' and initially suggesting 'HooXi gets him by chance,' the visual confirms Nexa's double kill. HuNter- then secures a pistol kill on cadiaN, who was seen planting the bomb, with commentators noting 'Hunter has crept his way all up short.' The round escalates into a dramatic 1v1 clutch between HooXi and Skullz, with commentators exclaiming 'Skullz! Oh dear, he gets undone instead' as HooXi eliminates Skullz to win the round. The G2 players erupt in celebration, HooXi raising his fist, while the Team Liquid coach stands in visible disappointment. Sponsor logos like Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy are prominently displayed on the HUD and jerseys throughout the high-stakes action.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a first-person perspective of a tense Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map during IEM Chengdu 2024, showing Team Liquid leading G2 Esports 6-0 in Round 7. Caster HUGO sets the scene by highlighting G2's struggle, noting they've won "only one of the last 11 rounds played" and need to "get back to their winning ways." As TL pushes the B-site, an explosion sounds, and Caster JUSTHARRY describes "another nice nade," but criticizes G2's defensive play, stating they "don't even clear [YEKINDAR] properly" and that "he is just completely forgotten about." Despite TL's aggressive push, YEKINDAR is eliminated by nexa, followed by Twistzz falling to Nexa's dual pistols. The round culminates in a dramatic 1v1 clutch as G2's huNter- eliminates cadiaN with a precise pistol shot, then secures the round by eliminating Skullz. The casters confirm G2's crucial win, with HUGO declaring, "G2 make that 12 rounds now," shifting the score to 6-1. This victory is met with excited shouts of "Good fucking shit!" and "Nice one!" from G2 players, including huNter- and m0NESY who are seen celebrating on camera, while TL's coach stands up in disappointment. The scene transitions to Round 8, with TL again pushing the B-site in the sunlit Mediterranean environment. YEKINDAR engages, eliminating Niko before being eliminated himself by Nexa. JUSTHARRY observes G2 players looking "mindful as heck," while HUGO describes "two Mollys forced out very early." JUSTHARRY continues to comment on YEKINDAR's "timing on the clear" and Niko's inability to "get in his groove," with HUGO adding that a missed opportunity "felt like a guaranteed kill for him," as YEKINDAR is left "still alone" at the round's close. The HUD displays various sponsor logos, with casters JUSTHARRY and HUGO providing continuous, high-energy commentary throughout the intense firefights.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a first-person perspective of a Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map during the IEM Chengdu 2024 Group Stage, with Team Liquid (TL) leading 6-0 against G2 Esports in Round 7. The HUD displays the minimap, player health, weapons, and scores, with G2’s players (nexa, HooXi, huNter-, m0NESY, Niko) and TL’s (YEKINDAR, Twistzz, Skullz, NAF, cadiaN) listed. The scene begins with G2 defending B-site, and TL pushing aggressively. YEKINDAR is eliminated by nexa in a close-range firefight, followed by Twistzz falling to Nexa’s dual pistols. The round becomes a 1v1 clutch as m0NESY and Niko are eliminated, leaving huNter- alive against TL’s remaining players. huNter- eliminates cadiaN with a precise pistol shot, then secures the round by eliminating Skullz in a tense 1v1, winning the round for G2. The camera cuts to the real-world players, showing G2’s m0NESY and huNter- celebrating, while TL’s coach stands up in disappointment. The scene transitions to Round 8, with TL now pushing B-site again. YEKINDAR engages and is eliminated by Nexa, followed by Niko falling to YEKINDAR’s gunfire. The round continues with intense firefights, and the HUD shows the score shifting to 7-0 in TL’s favor. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings, graffiti, and narrow alleys, with the B-site as the focal point. Sponsor logos for Intel, ESL, Predator, DHL, Monster Energy, Coinbase, Honda, and Logitech are visible on the HUD and background. The casters JUSTHARRY and HUGO are noted in the top-right corner, with observers JAK3YCSGO and JEYRAZZ. The atmosphere is tense and competitive, with rapid gunfire, strategic positioning, and emotional reactions from the players.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with intense commentary describing a high-stakes round from Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 on the Inferno map, as G2 Esports, starting at 0-7, defends B-site against an aggressive Team Liquid push. Gunshots punctuate the action as commentators highlight G2's "nice play" and "bursting heads." From a first-person perspective, Nexa is seen eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz with precise shots, while huNter- takes down cadiaN, who had just planted the bomb. Commentators note Team Liquid's initial confidence, believing the round "should be over" after Yekindar's actions, but G2 "flips the script." Footsteps are heard as Skullz is spotted, leading to a tense 1v1 clutch. The commentators build suspense, stating "now it's Skullz, do or die," as m0NESY, using a pistol and then a rifle, engages. After a flurry of gunshots, m0NESY secures the clutch against Skullz, prompting the commentators to exclaim, "m0NESY is one step too far!" and declare that G2 "finally get on the board" on the back of his clutch. Visually, G2 players Nexa and m0NESY celebrate their hard-fought win, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in visible disappointment, all against the backdrop of the sunlit Mediterranean map and prominent sponsor logos. The crowd erupts in cheers and applause, underscoring the high-stakes victory.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment captures a high-stakes round from the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024, played on the Inferno map in a Decider match between G2 Esports and Team Liquid. The round begins with G2 at 0-7, defending B-site, and Team Liquid pushing aggressively. The gameplay is shown from a first-person perspective, switching between players like Nexa, m0NESY, and Skullz, with the HUD displaying health, ammo, and player status. G2’s Nexa eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with precise shots, while huNter- takes down cadiaN, who had planted the bomb. The round narrows to a 1v1 clutch between m0NESY and Skullz, with m0NESY securing the win by eliminating Skullz after a tense exchange. The final moments show the G2 team celebrating the clutch, with Nexa and m0NESY visibly relieved, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in disappointment. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings, archways, and graffiti, with the minimap showing B-site as the focal point. segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a wide shot of the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 stage, showcasing G2 Esports players in black jerseys and Team Liquid players in blue and white. The scene quickly transitions to intense in-game Counter-Strike: Global Offensive on the Inferno map, with G2 trailing 1-7 in Round 9. As the action unfolds, a commentator immediately sets the scene for "the one-v-one." From G2’s cadiaN's perspective, using a sniper rifle at B-site, gunshots ring out, and a commentator exclaims "woo!" as cadiaN eliminates Yekindar with a precise headshot, described as "plucked." The commentator identifies "cadiaN" and notes his "stay mobile" playstyle, adding that "he's been quick" despite rumors of being "a little under the weather." The camera switches to Nexa, who, with dual-wielded weapons, eliminates Twistzz and then Yekindar again amidst more gunshots, prompting a commentator's "Okay." The commentator then identifies "Skullz" as hearing more. huNter- follows up, eliminating cadiaN with a pistol, leaving G2 with three players. Commentators describe Team Liquid's "comfortable position" to "reset and regroup." Nexa then engages Skullz, eliminating him with a rifle shot, and HooXi eliminates NAF with dual pistols, setting up a 1v1 clutch. The commentator highlights Nexa's previous performance, stating he "was the guy who opened up the last round" and is "gonna have to do it all over again," describing him "creeping up through short" and "keen to deliver," securing "that opener onto Twist." They also note a player was "blinded by the flashbang" and "cadiaN lending a helping hand to his teammate." huNter- secures the final kill with a pistol against Skullz, winning the round for G2. Throughout, sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy are visible, while the ESL Pro Tour and Intel branding appear on the HUD. The Team Liquid coach is seen visibly disappointed after the round loss.

The scene transitions to in-game footage of a Counter-Strike: Global Offensive match on the Inferno map, specifically during Round 9 of a Group Stage Advancement Match, with G2 trailing 1-7 against Team Liquid. The minimap shows Team Liquid pushing aggressively, and cadiaN eliminates Yekindar with a precise headshot. The camera then switches to Nexa, who uses a dual-wielded weapon to eliminate Twistzz and then Yekindar again, reducing Team Liquid to three players. huNter- follows up by eliminating cadiaN with a pistol, leaving G2 with three players alive. The action intensifies as Nexa engages Skullz, eliminating him with a rifle shot, and then HooXi eliminates NAF with dual pistols, setting up a 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz. huNter- secures the final kill with a pistol, winning the round for G2. Throughout the gameplay, sponsor logos such as DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy appear in the lower third, while the ESL Pro Tour and Intel branding are visible on the HUD and background. The Team Liquid coach is seen standing with a clipboard, visibly disappointed after the round loss. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings, narrow alleys, and a blue truck, consistent with the Inferno map’s B-site area.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with a first-person perspective from G2's huNter- on the Inferno map during IEM Chengdu 2024, with G2 trailing 1-7 against Team Liquid in a 2v3 situation. A commentator describes huNter- taking a shot, noting he "lands a tag to huNter-" as he eliminates YEKINDAR, with game sounds of gunshots and smoke. The commentator then sets up Liquid for a retake, mentioning they are "a man up in the 3v2," and describes huNter- being "down low after that orb just sinks its teeth into him on the smoke break." The scene shifts to NIKO, with the commentator suggesting "Niko might have to do the heavy lifting here" and recalling "I've seen Niko wreak havoc in this exact position" amidst game sounds. NIKO engages in a firefight, eliminating NAF with a rifle, prompting intense commentary: "One kill from Niko! Wide up the double! Just cadiaN left to deal with!" and "Niko lights up Team Liquid! That's now two in a row for G2!", accompanied by gunshots and UI sounds. A live feed shows G2 players in black jerseys, adorned with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, reacting with intense focus and celebration. The commentator reflects on G2's performance, noting "It's been a long time since they're winning ways, but they start to chain some rounds together now." Gameplay resumes with NAF from Team Liquid in a 1v1 against m0NESY, who eliminates him with a pistol, ending the round with G2 winning 2-7, leading to player celebrations. In the next round, with G2 on defense, the camera follows NAF from Team Liquid pushing B-site, where a commentator describes him as being "in a very dedicated position here" and that he "gets out with the double kill!", before NAF is eliminated by Nexa. The commentator also mentions "Nexa trying to get out through the apartments." The round continues with Skullz from Team Liquid in a 1v1 against huNter-, who secures the kill, winning the round for G2. The final scene shows the Team Liquid coach, in a blue and white jersey with Coinbase and Honda logos, standing up with a clipboard, displaying clear disappointment. The sunlit Mediterranean-style urban environment of Inferno, with its stone buildings and graffiti, is consistently visible, along with HUD sponsor logos for DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, Monster Energy, and Intel, and background branding for Intel Extreme Masters and ESL Pro Tour.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with intense Counter-Strike: Global Offensive gameplay on the Inferno map during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match, as casters JUSTHARRY and HUGO provide dynamic commentary. Visually, G2 Esports, in black jerseys with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, are defending B-site against Team Liquid, in blue and white jerseys with Coinbase and Honda logos, with the scoreboard showing G2 trailing 2-8. The audio features the casters discussing Team Liquid's strategy, noting "Yekindar's missed the timing on this jiggle" and a grenade coming out "way too soon" as HooXi chases an opponent down. Gunshots punctuate the action as G2’s Nexa engages enemies, with the caster exclaiming he's "cleared out by Nexa!" after eliminating Twistzz. The casters describe the situation as "dire straits for Liquid" despite their "good damage." The intense firefight continues with more gunshots and the sound of a smoke grenade, as the casters suggest it "might just seal the deal on attempting this round." Visually, HooXi takes down NAF with dual pistols, and the bomb is planted by cadiaN before G2’s huNter- eliminates him with a pistol. The round culminates in a dramatic 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz, with huNter- securing the win amidst a flurry of gunshots. The camera then cuts to the real-world arena, showing the visibly disappointed Team Liquid coach with a clipboard, while G2 players celebrate their hard-fought round win. Sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy are visible on-screen and on jerseys, reinforcing the competitive environment, all observed by JAK3YCSGO and JEYRAZZ.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on Inferno unfolds with high tension. The first round sees G2 Esports defending B-site, where m0NESY, using a pistol, executes a "cheeky" 1v1 clutch against NAF, denying him a "sneaky defuse" as the bomb explodes, securing the "G2 round." The casters highlight m0NESY's decisive play as G2 players celebrate, with m0NESY raising his fist in triumph, while the Team Liquid coach shows visible disappointment. The scene transitions to the next round, with Team Liquid pushing B-site and cadiaN planting the bomb. Commentary notes "Yekindar's got one on B" before G2 responds aggressively, with Nexa eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz. huNter- then takes down cadiaN with a pistol. As "G2 try to battle back in," led by m0NESY and Niko, the round culminates in a 1v1 between HooXi and Skullz, with HooXi securing the kill to win the round. Throughout the intense gameplay, the HUD displays vital player information, sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy are visible, and the sunlit Mediterranean-style Inferno map provides the backdrop. Team branding is clear, with G2 in black (Logitech, Monster Energy) and Team Liquid in blue and white (Coinbase, Honda), all reinforcing the competitive ESL Pro Tour setting. Casters also provide context on G2's "man disadvantages" in previous rounds.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment captures a high-stakes round from the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match between G2 Esports and Team Liquid on the Inferno map. The round begins with G2 defending B-site, where m0NESY, using a pistol, eliminates NAF in a 1v1 clutch situation, securing the round for G2 as the bomb explodes. The scene cuts to the G2 players celebrating, with m0NESY raising his fist in triumph and the Team Liquid coach visibly disappointed. The next round shows Team Liquid pushing B-site with cadiaN planting the bomb. G2 responds with aggressive defense: Nexa eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz with precise shots, while huNter- takes down cadiaN with a pistol. The round ends in a 1v1 between HooXi and Skullz, with HooXi securing the kill to win the round. Throughout, the HUD displays player health, weapons, and the minimap, while sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy appear on-screen. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings, graffiti, and narrow alleys, consistent with the Inferno map. The players' jerseys clearly show team branding—G2 in black with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, Team Liquid in blue and white with Coinbase and Honda logos. The ESL Pro Tour branding is visible on the background wall, reinforcing the competitive setting.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the sunlit Inferno map captures a high-stakes round where G2 Esports, in black jerseys, defends B-site against Team Liquid, in blue and white, with G2 trailing 3-8. From G2’s m0NESY’s first-person perspective, the intense 4v3 situation unfolds as commentators describe Team Liquid as "left wanting in this retake," desperately seeking a "call to arms." Gunfire erupts, and the commentators announce "Skullz falls as m0NESY is swift to deal with him," followed by "Twistz dead." Visually, Nexa eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz, while HooXi takes down NAF. The commentators highlight "just Kadyan left standing," noting he "can't do it all alone" and is "pulling strings right now." As the action intensifies, Nexa is identified by commentators as the "first point of contact," who "lays waste to Team Liquid" with "m0NESY by his side." The round culminates in a critical 1v1 clutch between G2's huNter- and Team Liquid's Skullz, with huNter- securing the final kill to win the round for G2, bringing the score to 5-8. The commentators exclaim, "that is a pistol round locked in," praising "Hot hands, the best P2K player in the game right now." Post-round, G2 players celebrate their hard-fought victory, while Team Liquid's disappointment is palpable, with their coach standing with a clipboard. The HUD prominently displays sponsor logos like Intel, Predator, DHL, and Qiddiya, alongside match data and player feeds, all set against ESL Pro Tour branding.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the sunlit Inferno map intensifies as G2 Esports, trailing 5-8, defends B-site against Team Liquid. Commentators set the scene, noting Liquid is "looking for the B split" and HooXi's potential to "slow them down." G2's Nexa, dual-wielding, swiftly eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz. HooXi follows up with a pistol kill on NAF, reducing Team Liquid to two players, a turn of events the commentator observes as "what was once looking so good for Team Liquid is all called into question." m0NESY then "shines through" by eliminating cadiaN, who had just planted the bomb, leading to a tense 1v1 clutch between G2's huNter- and Liquid's Skullz. huNter- secures the round, bringing G2's score to 6-8. The G2 players, particularly Nexa and huNter-, erupt in visible celebration at their desk, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in clear disappointment. The action quickly resumes in Round 16, with G2 now 5v4. Commentators exclaim, "A positive desk slam for Nico! Thank goodness he's a game leader!" as Niko repositions and "tears through Team Liquid," eliminating Yekindar in a decisive firefight. The round concludes with G2 winning 6-8 as the timer hits zero, solidifying a "fantastic round for Nico" and G2's strong defense, all against the backdrop of the Mediterranean-style Inferno map with sponsor logos like Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy prominently displayed on the HUD and player jerseys.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment captures a high-stakes round from the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the Inferno map, with G2 Esports (5-8) defending against Team Liquid. The round begins with G2 in a 5v5 situation, defending B-site. Nexa, wielding a dual-wielded weapon, engages early, eliminating Yekindar and Twistzz. HooXi follows up with a pistol kill on NAF, reducing Team Liquid to 2 players. m0NESY secures a kill on cadiaN, who had planted the bomb, leaving Skullz as the last remaining Liquid player. The situation becomes a 1v1 clutch between huNter- and Skullz. huNter- successfully eliminates Skullz, securing the round for G2, who now lead 6-8. The scene cuts to the G2 players celebrating at their desk, with Nexa and huNter- visibly excited, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in disappointment. The gameplay resumes in Round 16, with G2 now 5v4, and Yekindar and Niko engaging in a firefight, resulting in Niko eliminating Yekindar. The round ends with G2 winning 6-8, as the timer hits 0:00. The environment is the sunlit, Mediterranean-style Inferno map, with stone buildings, graffiti, and narrow alleys, and the HUD displays sponsor logos like Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy. The players' jerseys show team logos and sponsor patches, with G2 in black and Team Liquid in blue and white.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the sunlit Inferno map unfolds with G2 Esports in a high-stakes 4v1 clutch against Team Liquid. Commentators set the scene, anticipating Team Liquid's push through B-site, noting the expiring molly. Rapid gunshots erupt as G2's Nexa eliminates YEKINDAR, followed by Niko taking down Twistzz, prompting an excited commentator to exclaim, "Niko, Niko willt, Niko lends a helping hand!" More intense gunshots and commentary about a player being "deleted by the pistols" accompany the action as huNter- eliminates cadiaN, who had just planted the bomb at B-site. The bomb is swiftly defused, confirmed by a distinct sound, securing an 8-7 round win for G2. The scene transitions to real-life footage of G2 players, including Nexa and huNter-, celebrating with visible relief, while the Team Liquid coach stands up in disappointment. The commentators continue to analyze Team Liquid's "persistence" and "crosshairs" as a 'Moments of Brilliance' replay showcases key eliminations, including HooXi taking out NAF and huNter- securing the final 1v1 against Skullz. The intense atmosphere is palpable, underscored by the continuous sounds of combat and the dynamic commentary, all set against the Mediterranean backdrop of the Inferno map, adorned with various sponsor logos like Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, Monster Energy, Coinbase, and Honda.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of G2 Esports player m0NESY, intensely focused at his station during the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 event, with ESL Pro Tour branding and sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, and Logitech visible. The segment is punctuated by rapid gunshots as commentators begin, with one noting a player is "holding the line." The scene transitions to intense in-game footage on the Inferno map, where G2 is defending B-site in a critical 5v4 situation against Team Liquid, trailing 7-9. Commentators exclaim, "he's ripe to get this one is m0NESY," as m0NESY, using a sniper rifle, eliminates YEKINDAR and Twistzz from long range. The commentator continues, "he's having a field day, third kill in the round, it's all m0NESY," amidst more gunshots. HooXi and huNter- secure kills with pistols, reducing Team Liquid to one player. An explosion sound marks the round becoming a 1v1 clutch as NAF is eliminated by HooXi, leaving Skullz as the last man standing. Commentators declare, "this one gets closed out cleanly, G2 right back to it." The camera cuts to the G2 players’ reactions—m0NESY celebrates with a fist pump, while Nexa and huNter- show relief. The round ends with huNter- eliminating Skullz, tying the score at 9-9. The next round begins with G2 on offense, and Nexa, referred to as "the next" by commentators, using a dual-wielded weapon, eliminates YEKINDAR and Twistzz in quick succession. The scene shifts to huNter- engaging cadiaN, who plants the bomb at B-site, with a commentator noting, "that was the bomb on the back of cadiaN doing that as well." Despite heavy smoke and flashbangs, huNter- eliminates cadiaN, and Nexa secures the final kill on Skullz, winning the round 10-9. Commentators mention "still huNter- here to find" and YEKINDAR "can't quite deal with him." The G2 players celebrate, with Nexa raising his hand in triumph, while the Team Liquid coach stands up, visibly disappointed. The HUD displays sponsor logos like Monster Energy, Qiddiya, and 1XBET, and the minimap shows the Inferno layout, enhancing the tense, high-stakes atmosphere with dynamic lighting and smoke effects.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match between G2 Esports and Team Liquid, tied at 9-9 in Round 18 on the Inferno map, unfolds with intense commentary and the sounds of combat. The action begins near the B-site as G2’s m0NESY, wielding a colorful AWP, engages Team Liquid’s NAF. Commentators excitedly narrate, noting "m0NESY needs more" and his "lightning fast" actions, as m0NESY eliminates NAF with a precise headshot. Despite this, a commentator later mistakenly celebrates, exclaiming "Naf swung on and he'll hold the line. Naf locks it in." The scene then shifts to G2’s Nexa, who swiftly eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz in quick succession, reducing Team Liquid to just cadiaN and Skullz. Game sounds of gunshots and a bomb plant are heard as cadiaN plants the bomb at B-site, with commentators confirming "bomb plant in for Liquid" and "bomb has been planted," also mentioning "Katie and naded out" (referring to cadiaN). G2’s huNter- then takes down cadiaN with a clean pistol shot. The round culminates in a tense 1v1 between G2’s huNter- and Team Liquid’s Skullz, with huNter- securing the final kill after a brief firefight, winning the round for G2, even as a commentator earlier stated "Hunter dealt with." The camera cuts to the real-world players, showing G2’s Nexa and huNter- celebrating with raised fists, while Team Liquid’s coach stands up in disappointment. The sunlit Mediterranean-style urban map, Inferno, with its stone buildings and graffiti, is visible, along with sponsor logos like Intel, ESL, Predator, DHL, Qiddiya, Monster Energy, Coinbase, and Honda on the HUD and background walls, reinforcing the competitive esports setting.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a close-up of Team Liquid players, in their blue and white jerseys featuring Coinbase, Honda, and Monster Energy logos, seated in ESL-branded gaming chairs at the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 event, against a backdrop of prominent ESL, Intel, DHL, and Predator branding with purple ambient lighting. Commentators immediately highlight Team Liquid's performance, with one stating, "And Liquid with nothing to go off of, secure double digits, maintain this lead over G2," and later adding, "Refusing to let G2 have that lead for even a moment." The scene transitions to in-game footage from the Inferno map, where Team Liquid is pushing aggressively at B-site against G2 Esports, with the score tied at 9-9 in Round 19. A commentator praises NAF's strategic play, noting, "What great rooting for NAF as well, they go back port side through boiler," as NAF is shown in a first-person perspective engaging enemies with a colorful rifle, leading to TL winning the round 10-9. As Round 20 begins with TL leading 10-9, the gameplay shifts to a tense 1v1 clutch situation at B-site. Commentators mention "Yekindar's luck, V m0NESY" and react to Yekindar's elimination with an exclaimed, "Oh, it's just a tag and Yekindar, wow!" G2’s m0NESY, HooXi, and huNter- are eliminated, leaving only Nexa alive, while on the TL side, Yekindar, Twistzz, and cadiaN are eliminated, leaving Skullz as the last man standing. A commentator observes, "HooXi runs through his teammate's Molotov," and later analyzes G2's strategy as "such a weird call for G2 to block." Nexa, using a dual-wielded weapon, eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz, and huNter- eliminates cadiaN, who had planted the bomb. The final 1v1 sees huNter- eliminate Skullz, securing the round for G2. Throughout the intense gameplay, gunshots, character movement, and UI sounds are prominent, alongside the commentators' detailed analysis. The video concludes with the G2 players celebrating their triumphant win, while the Team Liquid coach stands up, visibly disappointed, all within the sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting of Inferno, with the HUD displaying match context, player stats, and sponsor logos like Intel, 1xBet, DHL, Predator, and Qiddiya.

The final 1v1 sees huNter- facing Skullz, who is eliminated, securing the round for G2. The G2 players celebrate, while the Team Liquid coach stands up, visibly disappointed. The environment is a sunlit Mediterranean-style urban setting with stone buildings and narrow alleys. The video concludes with the G2 players’ triumphant reactions and the Team Liquid coach’s dejected expression.

segments.integrated_caption: The Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on Inferno sees G2 Esports (9-10) battling Team Liquid (10-11) in a Decider round. Commentators note G2's 'frustrating round' as Team Liquid pushes B-site, with cadiaN planting the bomb, accompanied by a distinct beeping sound. G2, down to nexa and huNter-, defends fiercely. Nexa, wielding a colorful dual-wielded weapon, eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz in quick succession, while huNter- secures a kill on cadiaN with a pistol. Commentators mention 'Monesy hits the tag on Yekindar' and speculate 'Yekindar's probably screaming, come B' before he's headshot. The bomb explodes with a loud boom, and Team Liquid wins the round 11-9, leaving G2's nexa and huNter- focused but frustrated, and their coach visibly disappointed. Commentators discuss G2's limited weaponry, noting 'only two guns' and 'you will not have more rifles,' unless 'Nexa buys a Famas.' The next round begins with Team Liquid pushing again. Commentators describe 'Hunter will continue creeping down through middle' and 'HooXi alone over towards B,' who 'gets smoked off' early. They further state that 'even though Hunter is arriving... he's mopped up' and his AK is 'irretrievable.' Despite this commentary suggesting their neutralization, the visual shows G2’s m0NESY and Niko are eliminated early, but the round culminates in a thrilling 1v1 clutch where HooXi eliminates NAF, with commentators noting 'Naf does not give them the room,' and huNter- finishes off Skullz, securing the round for G2. The players celebrate, with huNter- raising his fist, and the coach reacting with relief and intensity, all against the backdrop of the sunlit Inferno map with its stone buildings and sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, and Monster Energy.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment captures a high-stakes round from the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024 Group Stage Advancement Match on the Inferno map, with G2 Esports (9-10) facing Team Liquid (10-11) in a Decider round. The action begins with Team Liquid pushing B-site, where cadiaN plants the bomb. G2, with only two players alive (nexa and huNter-), defends fiercely. Nexa, wielding a colorful dual-wielded weapon, eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz in quick succession, while huNter- secures a kill on cadiaN with a pistol. The bomb explodes, and Team Liquid wins the round 11-9. The scene cuts to the G2 players' reactions—nexa and huNter- show focus and slight frustration, while the coach stands up, visibly disappointed. The next round begins with Team Liquid pushing again, and G2’s m0NESY and Niko are eliminated early. The round ends with a 1v1 clutch: HooXi eliminates NAF, and huNter- finishes off Skullz, securing the round for G2. The players celebrate, with huNter- raising his fist, and the coach reacts with a mix of relief and intensity. The environment is the sunlit, Mediterranean-style Inferno map, with stone buildings, narrow alleys, and graffiti, while the HUD displays sponsor logos like DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, Monster Energy, and ESL Pro Tour. The background wall features Intel, ESL, and Coinbase branding, reinforcing the competitive esports setting.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens at the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024, showcasing G2 Esports and Team Liquid competing in a decisive round on the Inferno map. As the scene transitions to intense first-person in-game footage, G2 defends B-site with Team Liquid leading 9-12. Commentators discuss the playoffs, noting "Niko risking it all here" and "HooXi's holding flashes for him." Team Liquid pushes, with a commentator exclaiming "Yekindar comes running and gunning for the entry." Visually, G2's Nexa swiftly eliminates Yekindar and Twistzz, while HooXi takes down NAF, reducing Team Liquid to two players. The commentator, however, attributes "three kills in the round" to HooXi, stating it "gives G2 a fighting chance." Despite the visual action of CadiaN planting the bomb at B-site, the commentator declares "Bomb still not planted" and describes "CadiaN now posted back of the site on this AWP, dream position." Visually, huNter- quickly eliminates CadiaN after the plant. The commentator continues, describing CadiaN's AWP as a threat and then dramatically announcing "CadiaN will walk it over the line!" and "Liquid rise up! Stopping G2 in their tracks," implying a Team Liquid victory. However, the visuals show huNter- securing a tense 1v1 clutch against the last remaining player, Skullz, to win the round for G2. The scene cuts back to the real-world stage where G2 players celebrate with hugs and high-fives, while Team Liquid’s coach stands disappointed, contrasting sharply with the audio commentary's declaration of a Liquid win. The professional esports arena, with sponsor logos like Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy, provides the backdrop for this intense, if audibly misreported, round.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a live esports event at the Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024, showcasing G2 Esports and Team Liquid competing in a decisive round on the Inferno map. The scene transitions to in-game footage from a first-person perspective, where G2 is defending B-site with a score of 9-12 in favor of Team Liquid. The round is in its final moments (Round 22/24), with both teams having 5 players alive initially. G2’s Nexa, HooXi, and huNter- are seen engaging in a coordinated defense, eliminating Yekindar, Twistzz, and NAF in quick succession, reducing Team Liquid to two players. CadiaN plants the bomb at B-site, but is swiftly eliminated by huNter-. With only Skullz remaining, he attempts to defuse the bomb but is eliminated in a 1v1 clutch by huNter-, securing the round for G2. The video cuts back to the real-world stage, where G2 players celebrate with hugs and high-fives, while Team Liquid’s coach stands up with a disappointed expression. The environment is a professional esports arena with branded backdrops featuring Intel, ESL, DHL, Predator, and other sponsors. The in-game HUD displays player health, weapons, and the minimap, with sponsor logos like Intel, DHL, Predator, Qiddiya, and Monster Energy appearing in the lower third. The players’ jerseys are clearly visible: G2 in black with Logitech and Monster Energy logos, and Team Liquid in blue and white with Coinbase and Honda logos. The atmosphere shifts from intense gameplay to celebratory camaraderie as G2 secures a crucial round.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a vibrant post-match celebration at Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024, as Team Liquid players, including YEKINDAR, NAF, Twistzz, cadiaN, and Skullz, clad in their blue and white jerseys adorned with Coinbase, Honda, and Monster Energy logos, embrace in a joyous group hug, displaying profound camaraderie and relief. The background features a dark blue wall prominently branded with Intel, ESL, DHL, and Predator logos, reinforcing the professional esports setting. As the camera pans across the triumphant team, two commentators provide analysis, noting that Team Liquid secured their victory "in a lengthy BO3 series." They elaborate that while "Inferno might be a home map for the G2 squad," Liquid has now "planted their flag here," having "at least locked in quarter-finals." The second commentator adds that this marks "Liquid's first Tier 1 LAN since Jan and they don't waste the opportunity," emphasizing that this is "only the first step for Liquid, high expectations, high goals, but they're on the right direction." Following the commentators' remarks, the scene transitions to a dark screen before revealing a detailed scoreboard overlay. This professional graphic displays comprehensive match statistics for both G2 and Team Liquid, highlighting individual player performances with metrics like K-D ratios, ADR, KAST, and ratings, with Team Liquid’s Twistzz and NAF notably leading in performance, all presented with a clean, dark interface and white text, typical of esports broadcasts.

entity_library.HooXi: G2 player, visually eliminates NAF, though commentators mistakenly attribute 'three kills in the round' to him and mention him 'holding flashes' for Niko.
entity_library.NAF: Team Liquid player, visually eliminated by HooXi.
entity_library.Skullz: Team Liquid player, last remaining, visually eliminated by huNter- in the final 1v1 clutch.
entity_library.Yekindar: Team Liquid player, visually eliminated by Nexa, with commentators noting him 'running and gunning for the entry.'
entity_library.Twistzz: Team Liquid player, visually eliminated by Nexa.
entity_library.cadiaN: Team Liquid player, visually plants the bomb at B-site and is then eliminated by huNter-, despite commentators describing him as 'posted back of the site on this AWP' and ultimately 'walking it over the line' to win the round for Team Liquid.
entity_library.JUSTHARRY: Caster name displayed in the top-right corner, whose voice provides analytical and play-by-play commentary throughout the segment, describing player actions and strategic situations.
entity_library.HUGO: Caster name displayed in the top-right corner, whose voice contributes to the analytical and play-by-play commentary, alongside JUSTHARRY, describing player actions and strategic situations.
entity_library.JAK3YCSGO: Observer handle displayed in the top-right corner, indicating live observer feed.
entity_library.JEYRAZZ: Observer handle displayed in the top-right corner, indicating live observer feed.
entity_library.Intel Extreme Masters Chengdu 2024: Event branding visible on the initial graphic and throughout the HUD, featuring logos for Intel, ESL, and Pro Tour, with the match context displayed at the top center, serving as the setting for the intense gameplay and commentary.
entity_library.Ancient Map: The game map, a sunlit ancient ruin with stone structures, tropical plants, and multiple pathways, shown in the top-left minimap and in-game environment, with B-site as the focal point, and its strategic elements discussed by commentators.
entity_library.ESL Pro Tour: Branding visible on the background wall behind the players, with logos for Intel, DHL, Predator, and other sponsors, reinforcing the competitive setting and providing the framework for commentators' discussion.
entity_library.DHL: Sponsor logo visible on the bottom of the screen during gameplay and on the background wall, appearing in the lower third of the screen.
entity_library.Predator: Sponsor logo visible on the bottom of the screen during gameplay, displayed in the lower third.
entity_library.Qiddiya: Sponsor logo visible on the bottom of the screen during gameplay, shown in the lower third.
entity_library.Monster Energy: Sponsor logo visible on the bottom of the screen during gameplay and on G2's jerseys, appearing in the lower third.
entity_library.Coinbase: Sponsor logo visible on Team Liquid's jerseys and on the background wall, displayed on the players' sleeves and the arena backdrop.
entity_library.Honda: Sponsor logo visible on Team Liquid's jerseys, appearing on the sleeves of the blue and white jerseys.
entity_library.Logitech: Sponsor logo visible on G2's jerseys, displayed on the black jerseys of the G2 players.
entity_library.Team Liquid Coach: A man in a blue and white Team Liquid jersey, visually stands up with a disappointed expression after the round loss, contrasting with the commentators' declaration of a Liquid win.
entity_library.Anubis Map: The game map, a sunlit ancient ruin with stone structures, tropical plants, and multiple pathways, shown in the top-left minimap and in-game environment, with B-site as the focal point, and mentioned by commentators when discussing Team Liquid's push: 'on Anubis'.
entity_library.Inferno Map: The game map, a Mediterranean-style urban environment with stone buildings, graffiti, and narrow alleys, shown in the top-left minimap and in-game environment, with B-site as the focal point, and commentators referencing specific map locations like 'banana.'
entity_library.Scoreboard Overlay: A detailed statistical display showing player performance metrics for G2 and Team Liquid, including K-D, +/-, ADR, KAST, and Rating, with Team Liquid’s Twistzz and NAF highlighted for strong performance.
